Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair to Replace Powell in May 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump announced his intent to nominate Kevin Warsh, a former Fed governor known for hawkish views, as the next Federal Reserve Chair, with Powell's term ending in May 2026.[1][2][3]
